title: justicia dejecta var. dejecta
intro: Justicia dejecta var. dejecta, also known as the 'Prairie Justicia' or 'Spurred Orchid Justicia', is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Acanthaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant's leaves and stems have been found to have health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. The leaves and stems can be prepared as teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, with some herbalists also using the plant in topical applications for skin issues and wounds.
